nodes.x: O praise the LORD, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.
i PSALM CXVII. An exhortation to praise God. H praise the Lord, all ye nations; praise him all ye people.
Hallelujah, meaning praise ye the Lord: that is, praise Jehovah - there are 4 Alleluias in this section.
For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the LORD [endureth] for ever. Praise ye the LORD.
